blended.narrative: Snowshoe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

Thursday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.
